title: Bluecore Energy raises $10M to build portable nuclear reactors on barges | TechCrunch
summary: Maritime nuclear energy startup Bluecore Energy on Tuesday said it had raised $10 million in a pre-seed funding round that was led by Slauson & Co. Dominic-Madori Davis is a senior venture capital and startup reporter at TechCrunch.
